summary: This ERC proposes a mechanism where a person (referred to as the "Asset Owner") can collateralize NFTs that represent locked deposits or assets, to borrow funds against them. These NFTs represent the right to claim the underlying assets, along with any accrued benefits, after a predefined maturity period. title: Perpetual Contract NFTs as Collateral
